name: MotiveWave
description_short: Professional charting platform specializing in Elliott Wave analysis, Fibonacci tools, and advanced technical studies for serious traders.
description_long:
MotiveWave is a premium charting and analysis platform that specializes in Elliott Wave analysis, making it the go-to tool for traders who base their strategies on wave theory. The platform provides automated Elliott Wave counting, Fibonacci analysis tools, and Gann studies that are far more sophisticated than what most platforms offer.

Beyond Elliott Wave, MotiveWave provides comprehensive charting capabilities with 300+ studies, multi-timeframe analysis, and order flow tools including footprint charts and volume profile. The platform supports both discretionary and automated trading through its strategy development framework.

MotiveWave connects to dozens of brokers and data feeds, supporting futures, forex, stocks, and crypto. Plans range from $99/month (Community Edition) to $499/month (Ultimate Edition) for the complete Elliott Wave suite. The platform runs on Windows, Mac, and Linux, offering true cross-platform compatibility.
pros: Best Elliott Wave analysis tools available
cons: Steep learning curve for Elliott Wave
scraped_features: Order Flow Trading with Volume Imprint (Bid/Ask, Volume, Profile display)
Market Profile/TPO (Time-Price Opportunity) analysis
Elliott Wave analysis with manual, guided auto-analyze, and fully automatic modes
Advanced DOM/MBO (Depth of Market/Market-by-Order) tools
Fully customizable charts and layouts
Replay Mode for backtesting strategies in risk-free environment
300+ technical studies and indicators
VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) studies
TPO expanded profiles with letter sequences
Harmonic Patterns recognition
Trade Copier for multi-account execution
Elliott Wave Scanner (patterns for waves 2, 3, 4, 5, E triangles)
Time and Price Ratios for market forecasting
Channel tools for wave structure identification and price projections
Decompose Levels for fractal wave analysis
Smart drawing tools
Trade Panel for direct order management from charts
Time & Sales Panel for historical tick data
Seamless multi-broker integration
Backtesting and automation capabilities
unique_selling_points: Most advanced Elliott Wave software with three operational modes: manual analysis, guided assistance, or full automation
Industry-leading advanced DOM/MBO tools for professional traders
Comprehensive order flow analysis in unified platform
Replay Mode for risk-free strategy development and backtesting
150,000+ active users with 15 years of product support
